GenAiFunction.description: This action helps you explore Data Cloud entities (Data Model Objects, Data Lake Objects, Calculated Insights), their fields, and relationships. - Use the "summary" scope to discover available entities. Optionally filter by entityType (DataModelObject, DataLakeObject, CalculatedInsight) or entityCategory (Profile, Engagement, Related). - Use the "details" scope with an entityName to see all fields, types, primary keys, and relationships for a specific entity. - Use the "relationships" scope with an entityName to see only how that entity connects to other entities (useful for planning JOINs). - Always use "summary" first to find the correct entity name before using "details" or "relationships". - Data Cloud entity names have special suffixes: __dlm (Data Model Objects), __dll (Data Lake Objects), __cio (Calculated Insights).
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: My Org Butler: Explore Data Cloud
